scripts.minify: npx terser src/main/resources/static/script.js --compress --mangle -o src/main/resources/static/script.min.js && npx terser src/main/resources/static/login.js --compress --mangle -o src/main/resources/static/login.min.js && npx cleancss -o src/main/resources/static/style.min.css src/main/resources/static/style.css && npx cleancss -o src/main/resources/static/style_additions.min.css src/main/resources/static/style_additions.css && npx cleancss -o src/main/resources/static/login.min.css src/main/resources/static/login.css && echo Minificacion completada
